## Repository Structure Report: T3 Code Monorepo

I've completed a thorough exploration of the T3 Code repository. Here's the comprehensive analysis:

---

### 1. Overall Monorepo Structure

**Root Directory:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775494078153-f20895`

The monorepo uses **Yarn Workspaces** with pnpm configuration:

- **apps/** - Application packages
  - `web` - React web frontend (main application)
  - `server` - Backend server
  - `desktop` - Electron desktop application
  - `marketing` - Marketing website

- **packages/** - Shared libraries
  - `contracts` - TypeScript/Effect schemas and types (RPC/API contracts)
  - `shared` - Shared utilities and models using Effect library

- **scripts/** - Build and development scripts

---

### 2. packages/shared Details

**Location:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775494078153-f20895/packages/shared`

**package.json exports (subpath exports):**
```json
{
  "./model": "./src/model.ts",
  "./git": "./src/git.ts",
  "./logging": "./src/logging.ts",
  "./shell": "./src/shell.ts",
  "./Net": "./src/Net.ts"
}
```

**Source files:**
- `git.ts` - Git utilities
- `logging.ts` - Logging functionality
- `shell.ts` - Shell command execution
- `Net.ts` - Network utilities
- `model.ts` - Model-related utilities
- `model.test.ts`, `Net.test.ts`, `shell.test.ts` - Tests

**Dependencies:**
- `@t3tools/contracts` (workspace)
- `effect` (Effect-TS library)

---

### 3. packages/contracts Details

**Location:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775494078153-f20895/packages/contracts`

**Built for dual distribution:** ESM and CommonJS (via tsdown)

**Source files:**
- `index.ts` - Main export barrel
- `baseSchemas.ts` - Base Effect schemas
- `model.ts` - Model definitions with OPTIONS_BY_PROVIDER structure
- `orchestration.ts` - Thread, session, and orchestration schemas
- `provider.ts` - Provider runtime and configuration
- `providerRuntime.ts` - Provider runtime types
- `terminal.ts` - Terminal event and state schemas
- `ws.ts` - WebSocket message schemas
- `server.ts` - Server configuration schemas
- `keybindings.ts` - Keybinding definitions
- `git.ts` - Git operation schemas
- `project.ts` - Project configuration
- `ipc.ts` - IPC message contracts
- `editor.ts` - Editor-related types

**Key Types Exported:**
- `ThreadId`, `ProjectId`, `TurnId`, `MessageId` - ID types
- `OrchestrationReadModel` - Complete UI state model
- `ProviderKind` - Provider enumeration
- `OrchestrationSessionStatus` - Session state
- `RuntimeMode`, `ProviderInteractionMode` - Execution modes
- Model options with slugs: `gpt-5.4`, `gpt-5.3-codex`, `gpt-5.3-codex-spark`, etc.

---

### 4. apps/web Package Details

**Location:** `/private/var/folders/vq/9q38rw0x2455zr_whqcrjbhr0000gn/T/planmode-bench-wt-run-1775494078153-f20895/apps/web`

**Entry Point:** `src/main.tsx`

**Key Dependencies:**
- React 19 with React Router (TanStack Router v1.160.2)
- React Query (TanStack) for server state management
- Zustand for client state management
- TailwindCSS 4.0 with `@tailwindcss/vite` plugin
- Lexical (rich text editor)
- Base UI React components
- xterm.js (terminal emulation)

**State Management:**
- **Zustand store** (`src/store.ts`) - Manages:
  - `projects: Project[]` - List of projects with expansion state
  - `threads: Thread[]` - Chat threads with messages, sessions
  - `threadsHydrated: boolean` - Sync flag
  - Persists to localStorage under `t3code:renderer-state:v8`

- **Store actions:**
  - `syncServerReadModel()` - Syncs complete state from orchestration server
  - `markThreadVisited/markThreadUnread()` - Track read status
  - `toggleProject/setProjectExpanded()` - UI state
  - `setError()` - Error handling
  - `setThreadBranch()` - Git branch management

**Providers/Hooks:**
- `useTheme()` (`src/hooks/useTheme.ts`) - Dark/light/system theme with localStorage persistence
- `useMediaQuery()` - Media query hook
- `useTurnDiffSummaries()` - Diff tracking

**CSS Setup:**
- TailwindCSS 4.0 with inline `@theme`
- Custom CSS properties for design tokens
- Dark mode via `.dark` class on `<html>` element
- No transitions during theme switches (`.no-transitions` class)

**Design Tokens (CSS Custom Properties):**

**Light Mode:**
```css
--color-primary: oklch(0.488 0.217 264)
--color-background: white
--color-foreground: #18181B
--color-border: rgba(0,0,0,8%)
--color-input: rgba(0,0,0,10%)
```

**Dark Mode:**
```css
--color-primary: oklch(0.588 0.217 264)
--color-background: color-mix(95% neutral-950, 5% white)
--color-foreground: #F4F4F5
--color-border: rgba(255,255,255,6%)
--color-input: rgba(255,255,255,8%)
```

**Radius Scales:**
```
--radius-sm: calc(var(--radius) - 4px)
--radius-md: calc(var(--radius) - 2px)
--radius-lg: var(--radius)
--radius-xl: calc(var(--radius) + 4px)
--radius-2xl: calc(var(--radius) + 8px)
... (continues to 4xl)
Base: --radius: 0.625rem
```

**Component Structure:**
```
src/
├── main.tsx - App entry with RouterProvider
├── App.tsx - [NOT FOUND - no App component]
├── router.ts - Router setup with QueryClient + StoreProvider
├── store.ts - Zustand store
├── routes/
│   ├── __root.tsx - Root layout with error boundary, event sync
│   ├── _chat.tsx - Chat layout with sidebar
│   ├── _chat.$threadId.tsx - Thread view
│   ├── _chat.index.tsx - Default chat view
│   └── _chat.settings.tsx - Settings
├── components/
│   ├── ui/ - Base UI components (44 files)
│   ├── BranchToolbar.tsx - Git branch controls
│   ├── ChatView.tsx - Message display
│   ├── DiffPanel.tsx - Code diff viewer
│   ├── Sidebar.tsx - Project/thread sidebar
│   └── ... (many others)
├── hooks/
│   ├── useTheme.ts - Theme management
│   ├── useMediaQuery.ts - Responsive
│   └── useTurnDiffSummaries.ts
├── lib/
│   ├── gitReactQuery.ts - Git operations
│   ├── serverReactQuery.ts - Server queries
│   ├── providerReactQuery.ts - Provider queries
│   └── ... (utilities)
└── index.css - Global styles with Tailwind
```

**Web Component Library:**
- Located in `src/components/ui/`
- 44+ components built with Base UI and class-variance-authority
- Includes: button, input, select, dialog, menu, popover, toast, etc.

---

### 5. Existing CSS & Theming

**index.css** (`src/index.css`) - 407 lines with:

- TailwindCSS imports and @theme directive
- Custom variant for dark mode: `.dark:is(.dark, .dark *)`
- Design token aliases for color palette
- Typography: DM Sans (UI), SF Mono (code)
- Scrollbar styling for light/dark modes
- Chat markdown rendering styles (`.chat-markdown`)
- Diff panel theming
- Electron drag region handling

**Theme System:**
- **Storage key:** `t3code:theme` (localStorage)
- **Options:** "light", "dark", "system"
- **Transition suppression:** Uses `.no-transitions` class to prevent flashing
- **System preference detection:** Via `window.matchMedia("(prefers-color-scheme: dark)")`
- **Initialization:** Applied immediately on module load (in useTheme.ts)

---

### 6. TypeScript Configuration

**Root `tsconfig.base.json`:**
```json
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2023",
    "module": "ESNext",
    "moduleResolution": "Bundler",
    "strict": true,
    "noUncheckedIndexedAccess": true,
    "exactOptionalPropertyTypes": true,
    "noImplicitOverride": true,
    "useDefineForClassFields": true,
    "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "allowSyntheticDefaultImports": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "resolveJsonModule": true
  }
}
```

**apps/web/tsconfig.json:**
- Extends base config
- Adds `composite: true` and `jsx: "react-jsx"`
- ES2023, DOM, DOM.Iterable libs
- Path alias: `~/*` → `./src/*`
- @effect/language-service plugin with strict diagnostics
- Vite client types

**packages/shared/tsconfig.json:**
- Extends base, minimal config

**packages/contracts/tsconfig.json:**
- Extends base
- Effect language service plugin

---

### 7. How Imports Work Between Packages

**Workspace Dependencies (package.json):**
```json
{
  "@t3tools/shared": "workspace:*",
  "@t3tools/contracts": "workspace:*"
}
```

**Usage in apps/web:**
```typescript
// Direct imports from contracts
import { ThreadId, OrchestrationReadModel } from "@t3tools/contracts";

// Subpath exports from shared
import { getModelOptions } from "@t3tools/shared/model";
import { resolveModelSlug } from "@t3tools/shared/model";

// Relative path aliases in web
import { Button } from "~/components/ui/button";
```

**Module Resolution:**
- **TypeScript path mapping:** Enabled via `tsconfigPaths: true` in Vite
- **Workspace imports:** Resolved via package.json `exports` field
- **Monorepo linking:** Handled by yarn workspaces
- **ESM modules:** All packages use `"type": "module"`

**Vite Configuration:**
- TailwindCSS plugin for CSS-in-JS compilation
- TanStack Router plugin for route generation
- React Compiler plugin (babel-plugin-react-compiler)
- Source maps enabled (configurable)
- HMR over WebSocket for Electron

---

### 8. Key Integration Points

**App Initialization Flow:**
1. `main.tsx` → Creates router with QueryClient + StoreProvider
2. Router wraps with `QueryClientProvider` → `StoreProvider`
3. Root route (`__root.tsx`) sets up:
   - Toast providers (centered + anchored)
   - Event sync from server (orchestration)
   - Terminal event listener
   - WebSocket connection management
4. Layout routes render sidebar + outlet

**Server Sync:**
- `useStore.syncServerReadModel()` called from EventRouter effect
- Listens to `api.orchestration.onDomainEvent()`
- Maps server `OrchestrationReadModel` to local `AppState`
- Updates projects, threads, messages, sessions

**CSS Architecture:**
- **Globals:** `index.css` with Tailwind utilities
- **Theme:** CSS variables controlled by `useTheme()` hook
- **Components:** Inline className objects using class-variance-authority
- **Responsive:** TailwindCSS breakpoints + `useMediaQuery()` hook
- **Dark mode:** Selector `.dark` class toggled on `<html>` element

---

### Summary Table

| Aspect | Details |
|--------|---------|
| **Monorepo Tool** | Yarn Workspaces |
| **Package Manager** | Bun 1.3.9 |
| **Node Version** | 24.13.1+ |
| **Build Tool** | Vite 8.0.0-beta.12 |
| **Framework** | React 19 |
| **Routing** | TanStack Router 1.160.2 |
| **State (Server)** | React Query 5.90.0 |
| **State (Client)** | Zustand 5.0.11 |
| **Styling** | TailwindCSS 4.0 |
| **Type System** | Effect-TS schemas |
| **Theme Storage** | localStorage under `t3code:theme` |
| **CSS Variables** | 30+ custom properties for colors, radius, animations |
| **Dark Mode** | System preference detection + manual toggle |
| **Terminal** | xterm.js with styling in index.css |
| **Diff Viewer** | @pierre/diffs library |
| **Editor** | Lexical 0.41.0 |

All file paths are absolute and ready for reference throughout your development work.

Both `bun lint` (0 errors, only 2 pre-existing server warnings) and `bun typecheck` (7/7 packages pass) are clean. Here's a summary of everything that was built:

---

## What was implemented

### 1. `packages/shared/src/theme.ts` — Theme contract (new file)
Defines the shared theme type system with no runtime dependencies:
- **`ThemeId`** — `"t3-dark" | "t3-light" | "t3-midnight"` union type
- **`ThemeColors`** — covers all 7 required surfaces: `background`, `foreground`, `accent`, `sidebar`, `editor`, `terminal`, `statusBar`
- **`Theme`** — combines id, label, dark flag, and colors
- **`BUILT_IN_THEMES`** — the 3 concrete themes as a `ReadonlyArray<Theme>`
- **`getBuiltInTheme(id)`** and **`isThemeId(value)`** — runtime helpers
- Exported via new `"./theme"` subpath in `packages/shared/package.json`

### 2. `apps/web/src/hooks/useColorTheme.ts` — Theme hook (new file)
Follows the same `useSyncExternalStore` pattern as the existing `useTheme.ts`:
- Persists to `t3code:color-theme` in localStorage
- Applies all CSS custom properties via `element.style.setProperty` on `<html>` (inline styles override the stylesheet, so themes fully take control)
- Sets `--background`, `--foreground`, `--primary`, `--ring`, all derived tokens (`--muted`, `--border`, `--input`, etc.), plus the new `--t3-sidebar`, `--t3-editor`, `--t3-terminal`, `--t3-status-bar` slots
- Sets `color-scheme` (light/dark) for OS integration
- Applies theme immediately on module load to prevent flash
- Syncs across tabs via `StorageEvent`
- Supports `null` (no override — existing Appearance system works normally)

### 3. `apps/web/src/components/ThemeProvider.tsx` — Provider (new file)
A renderless component that mounts the color theme side effects into the React tree. Added to `__root.tsx` alongside the existing `EventRouter`.

### 4. `apps/web/src/components/ThemeSelector.tsx` — Selector UI (new file)
A radio-group of theme buttons, each featuring a **mini UI preview** swatch that shows the sidebar strip, editor/content background, accent dot, and status bar strip using actual theme colors as inline styles. Includes a "Reset to system default" link to clear the color theme.

### 5. `apps/web/src/routes/_chat.settings.tsx` — Settings page update
Added a **Color Theme** section between Appearance and Codex App Server with a descriptive note that the color theme overrides the Appearance setting when active.

### 6. `apps/web/src/index.css` — CSS fallback vars
Added `--t3-sidebar`, `--t3-editor`, `--t3-terminal`, `--t3-status-bar` with fallbacks to the existing design tokens, so components can reference these slots even before a named theme is applied.
